category.description: Optional UI hint: e.g. "app" = show in Pipeon Basic mode (launchable GUI/container tools).

workflow_type.description: Optional classifier for tooling and templates (e.g. secretstore). Lowercase letters, digits, hyphens; must start with a letter. The engine does not branch on this field.

namespace.description: Optional author/org label for packages and discovery. Lowercase label (a-z, digits, hyphens); must not be a reserved word (e.g. dockpipe, core, system).

capability.description: Optional legacy metadata (ignored by the runner).

primitive.description: Deprecated — use capability. Same meaning as capability.

vault.description: Vault backend for secrets.vault_template → env (op and 1password use op inject today). Use none/off to skip for this workflow.

docker_preflight.description: When false, skip Docker reachability preflight when no step uses the container runner (host-only workflows).

compile_hooks.description: Shell commands run by dockpipe package compile workflow from the workflow source dir after validation, before packaging (e.g. go build).
